title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.670 - Finance director shall certify finding within thirty days
text:
362.670.  Finance director shall certify finding within thirty days. — The approval or disapproval by the finance director shall be certified by him in writing to each bank and trust company which is a party to the merger or such consolidation within thirty days after the date of submission of the agreement to him.
(L. 1967 p. 445) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 363.830)
